meaning: 纳布卢斯(西南亚巴勒斯坦地区的城市,在约旦河西岸)
examples: Qassem teaches at Najah University in the West Bank city of Nablus.
Shoppers enjoy the new mall in Nablus.
A few weeks ago Israel's chief rabbis went to Nablus to rededicate the shrine.
But the tea party in the office of the Nablus Mayor reportedly was electric.
The 45-minute journey from Ramallah to Nablus now takes Birzeit's supply trucks four or five hours.
